problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
